name: agile-methodology
description: Core delivery workflow skeleton with contribution points. This is the workflow-definition plugin's skeleton — stage-definition plugins fill the named slots at install time. The resolved workflow is written to .orqa/workflows/agile-methodology.resolved.json.

contribution_points.name: discovery-artifacts
contribution_points.description: Contribute discovery artifact types and research workflows.

contribution_points.name: implementation-workflow
contribution_points.description: Contribute implementation sub-workflows (task lifecycle, branching strategy).

contribution_points.name: review-process
contribution_points.description: Contribute review process (code review, gate definitions, acceptance criteria).

contribution_points.name: learning-pipeline
contribution_points.description: Contribute learning pipeline (lesson creation, retrospective, pattern tracking).

discover.description: Discovery stage — exploring the problem space, research, feasibility.

plan.description: Planning stage — scoping, estimation, task decomposition.

document.description: Documentation stage — capturing decisions, architecture, requirements.

implement.description: Implementation stage — active delivery of tasks.

review.description: Review stage — validating deliverables against acceptance criteria.

learn.description: Learning stage — retrospective, lesson capture, process improvement.

transitions.description: Skip documentation, go straight to implementation.
Review found fundamental issues requiring re-planning.

process_gates.name: understand-first
process_gates.message: THINK FIRST: What is the system you're modifying? What are its boundaries? What depends on this? What could break? Read the governing docs and understand the context before writing code.

process_gates.name: docs-before-code
process_gates.message: DOCUMENTATION CHECK: Have you read the documentation that defines this area? Check .orqa/documentation/ for specs, patterns, and constraints before implementing.

process_gates.name: plan-before-build
process_gates.message: PLANNING CHECK: Is there an epic or task that defines this work? Check .orqa/implementation/ for the scope, acceptance criteria, and implementation design.

process_gates.name: evidence-before-done
process_gates.message: VERIFICATION CHECK: You wrote code but didn't run make check or make test. Show evidence that the work is correct before completing.

process_gates.name: learn-after-doing
process_gates.message: LEARNING CHECK: Significant work was done this session. Check .orqa/learning/lessons/ for known patterns and consider if anything unexpected should be recorded.

delivery-review.description: Delivery review gate — AI pre-check followed by human review.
